programmes.show_name: The Secret Lives of Lighthouse Keepers
programmes.show_description: A rare glimpse into the working world of the teams who keep the lights on in 208 lighthouses round the coast of Scotland and the Isle of Man.

programmes.show_name: Hercules the Bear - A Love Story
programmes.show_description: The remarkable true story of the world's most famous grizzly bear and the Scottish couple who raised him as their own.
